title: Resolution authorizing the Honorable Mayor Caesar P. Perez to pay the amount of Fifty Pesos (P50.00) for the P1.00 annual rental of land to the Bureau of Plant Industry (BPI) for the lease of the 10,000 square meters used as Municipal Government Center for the period 2008 to 2019 as prior years payment and for the period 2020-2057 as advance payment.
